Metadata.title: PeakEngage — Mobile First Customer Engagement and Analytics Platform
Metadata.description: PeakEngage is a mobile-first customer engagement and analytics platform — digital passes in Apple and Google Wallet, multi-channel campaigns, data platform, analytics, and AI assistants for businesses.
Metadata.keywords: customer engagement platform, digital passes, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, loyalty cards, multi-channel campaigns, push notifications, email marketing, SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, analytics, AI assistants, retail

Hero.tagline: Mobile First Customer Engagement and Analytics Platform for Businesses
Hero.subtitle: Digital passes in Apple and Google Wallet, multi-channel campaigns, powerful analytics and AI assistants — all in one platform built for small and medium businesses. Specialized for retail.

phoneAlt.dotz: Dotz loyalty pass in Apple Wallet
phoneAlt.stampCard: Stamp card pass in Apple Wallet

aiAssistants.title: AI Assistants
aiAssistants.description: For executives, CRM managers, customer service and store managers

DigitalPasses.heading: Digital Cards and Passes for
DigitalPasses.description: Engage with your customers via frictionless adoption and distribution of digital cards and passes for Apple and Google Wallet.

loyaltyCards.title: Loyalty & Store Cards
loyaltyCards.description: Digital loyalty and store cards that customers always have in their wallet.

membershipCards.title: Membership & ID Cards
membershipCards.description: Digital membership cards, ID cards and passes for frictionless identification.

couponsOffers.title: Coupons, Offers & Tickets
couponsOffers.description: Distribute digital coupons, promotional offers and event tickets directly to wallets.

dynamicPasses.title: Dynamic & Personalized
dynamicPasses.description: Dynamic, personalized and updatable passes that keep customers engaged with real-time content.

distribution.title: Flexible Distribution
distribution.description: Distribute via QR code or URL, personalized URL links sent via email, SMS or print.

DigitalPasses.walletHomeScreens: Digital Passes in Apple & Google Wallet

Campaigns.heading: Multi-Channel
Campaigns.description: Reach your customers across every channel from a single platform. Design, launch and track campaigns with powerful tools.

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Engage directly with customers on mobile via SMS-style notifications on their lock screen.

email.title: Email
email.description: Flexible template-based email editor with customer profile-based personalization and intelligent contact management to ensure highest deliverability and reputation.

sms.title: SMS
sms.description: Standard traditional SMS marketing to reach customers directly on their phones.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Market to your customers inside the WhatsApp application with business profiles.

DataPlatform.heading: Comprehensive
DataPlatform.description: A unified data platform that brings together customer profiles, segmentation, promotions and more — all in one place.

customerProfile.title: 360° Customer Profile
customerProfile.description: Complete customer profile access with preferences, personalization, support for multiple profile types and flexible automated attribution.

segmentation.title: Customer Segmentation & Audience Builder
segmentation.description: Build powerful customer segments with flexible filtering and targeting capabilities.
bullets: Custom use-case specific filters using different strategies

schemes.title: Promotions, Vouchers & Discount Codes
schemes.description: Flexible schemes to drive engagement with promotions, vouchers and discount codes.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.description: Complete transaction data management and synchronization from POS systems.

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Inventory data integration for product-level insights and analytics.

loyalty.title: Loyalty
loyalty.description: Loyalty program data management with points, tiers and reward tracking.

Analytics.heading: Powerful
Analytics.description: Comprehensive analytics with a wide variety of visualization widgets and data tables. Multiple time resolutions and timeframe selections for deep insight.

loyaltyNonLoyalty.title: Loyalty & Non-Loyalty
loyaltyNonLoyalty.description: Compare loyalty vs non-loyalty customer behaviour, spend patterns and engagement.

sales.title: Sales Analytics
sales.description: Track sales by hour, daily trends, product performance and revenue metrics.

customerEngagement.title: Customer Engagement
customerEngagement.description: Monitor customer engagement metrics across all channels and touchpoints.

emailSmsCampaigns.title: Email & SMS Campaigns
emailSmsCampaigns.description: Detailed campaign performance reporting with deliverability, open rates and conversions.

Solutions.heading: Complete
Solutions.description: End-to-end solutions for retail businesses — from AI-powered assistants to POS integration and a complete SaaS platform.

aiAssistants.title: AI Assistants
aiAssistants.description: AI assistants for marketing, sales and business staff powered by machine learning and privately hosted LLMs.
bullets: Automatic application of machine learning and AI to customer data
Secure, privately hosted LLM for natural language interaction using text or voice
Access to real-time analytics and customer data
LLM-based natural language interface via text or voice
Store manager reports to engage with customers via phone and text
aiAssistants.posApp: The Peak Loyalty POS Mobile App

emailReceipts.title: Email Receipts
emailReceipts.description: Integrated real-time digital receipts of sale transactions delivered directly on the customer's phone.
bullets: Real-time sale notifications on the customer's device
Digital receipt details accessible from the wallet pass
Complete transaction history for the customer

crmForRetail.title: CRM for Retail
crmForRetail.description: POS-integrated promotions, loyalty and rewards platform for retailers. Makes it easy to collect and redeem points for customers.
bullets: Customer enrollment through POS or self-registration
Multiple types of loyalty and reward schemes

posIntegration.title: Retailer POS Integration
posIntegration.description: Seamless integration with your existing POS system for real-time data synchronization.
bullets: Futura integration via real-time API and scheduled updates
Simple, flexible REST API and file-based approach to integrating with any POS system

saasPlatform.title: Complete SaaS Platform
saasPlatform.description: A complete cloud-based platform that makes it easy to onboard new customers and manage your entire engagement strategy.
bullets: Configurable and flexible for customer-specific requirements
Complete web-accessible dashboard with security and roles
Automated export/import capabilities to integrate with other systems
Multilingual support and white-labelled service option available

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Customer Engagement?
cta.description: Get in touch to learn how PeakEngage can help your business build stronger customer relationships and drive growth.

ContactForm.heading: Get in Touch
ContactForm.description: Tell us about your business and we'll show you how PeakEngage can help.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.quote: Your privacy is critically important to us.

overview.title: Overview
overview.content: This policy explains how Peak Engagement Technologies collects and uses information through https://www.peakengage.com. It applies solely to data gathered via the website.

websiteVisitors.title: Website Visitors
websiteVisitors.content1: The company collects standard non-identifying browser data (type, language preference, referrer, timestamp). This helps understand visitor behaviour trends.
websiteVisitors.content2: The organisation also gathers IP addresses from logged-in users and blog commenters, disclosed under identical circumstances as personally-identifying information.

piiCollection.title: Personally-Identifying Information Collection
piiCollection.content: Visitors engaging with the site may provide personal details. For instance, blog sign-ups require a username and email address. Collection scope depends on interaction type.

security.title: Security
security.content: No method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. The company uses commercially acceptable protections but cannot guarantee absolute security.

externalLinks.title: External Links
externalLinks.content: The website contains third-party links outside company control. Users should review each site's privacy practices independently. The company assumes no responsibility for external content or policies.

googleAdWords.title: Google AdWords Remarketing
googleAdWords.content: The site employs remarketing services to advertise to previous visitors across Google properties. Third-party vendors use cookies for targeted ads. Users can adjust preferences via Google Ad Preferences or disable interest-based advertising.

informationProtection.title: Information Protection & Disclosure
informationProtection.content1: Personally-identifying data is shared only with employees, contractors, and affiliated organisations requiring access. Some may operate internationally; using the site implies consent to such transfers.
informationProtection.content2: The company will not rent or sell this information. Disclosure occurs only via subpoena, court order, governmental request, or when the company believes disclosure reasonably protects property, rights, or public welfare.

communications.title: Communications
communications.content: Registered users may receive occasional emails about new features, feedback requests, or product updates. Requests may be published to assist other users.

aggregatedStatistics.title: Aggregated Statistics
aggregatedStatistics.content: The organisation may publicly display visitor behaviour statistics without disclosing individual personally-identifying information.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content1: Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC uses "Cookies", similar technologies and services provided by others to display personalised content.
cookies.content2: Cookies store preferences on visitor computers. Users may refuse cookies via browser settings, though certain features may malfunction. Continued site navigation acknowledges cookie acceptance.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.content: Transaction participants provide additional personal and financial information as necessary. Collection is limited to what is required for transaction fulfilment. Users may decline, potentially preventing certain activities.

policyChanges.title: Policy Changes
policyChanges.content: The company may modify this policy at its discretion. Visitors should check frequently for updates. Continued site use constitutes acceptance of changes.

welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.content: Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC operates at +19253361701. By accessing the website, users accept all terms stated. Continued use implies full acceptance; discontinue if you disagree.

terminology.title: Terminology
terminology.content: The agreement defines "Client" and "You" as website visitors, while "Company," "We," and "Our" refer to Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC. All terms relate to how the company assists clients with services and products.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content1: We employ the use of cookies. By using Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC's website you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC's privacy policy.
cookies.content2: The company uses cookies for user detail retrieval and site functionality. Affiliate and advertising partners may also use cookies.

license.title: License
license.content: Peak Engagement Technologies, LLC owns intellectual property rights for website material. Users may view and print pages for personal use only. Prohibited activities include:

hyperlinking.title: Hyperlinking Policy
hyperlinking.content1: Certain organisations may link without approval: government agencies, search engines, news organisations, online directories, and accredited businesses. Links must not be misleading or falsely imply sponsorship.
hyperlinking.content2: Other organisations (Chambers of Commerce, educational institutions, law firms) may request approval. Approved links must use the company name, URL, or contextual descriptions — no logo use without trademark licence.

iframes.title: Iframes
iframes.content: Creating frames around pages or altering visual presentation requires prior written permission.

reservationOfRights.title: Reservation of Rights
reservationOfRights.content: The company reserves the right to request link removal at any time and amend terms unilaterally.

contentLiability.title: Content Liability
contentLiability.content: No link(s) may appear on any page on your website or within any context containing content or materials that may be interpreted as libelous, obscene or criminal. Users indemnify the company against claims arising from their website.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, we exclude all representations, warranties and conditions relating to our website. Exceptions include death, personal injury from negligence, and fraudulent misrepresentation. Free services carry no liability for loss or damage.
